reference: Hi, I am a thirty-year-old woman. About one month ago, I was suffering from typhoid. After one week, I developed a stomach infection, which went away after taking precautions. Then, again after a week, I have experienced stomach pain. What should I do? I want to ask why stomachaches keep occurring.
text: Hi, I'm a 30-year-old woman. About 1 month ago I was suffering from typhoid, and after 1 week I developed a stomach infection, which went away after taking precautions. Then, again after a week, I had a stomach stomachache. What should I do? I want to ask why stomachaches keep occurring.
